checks.message: Within 3 seconds of starting play, the player understands the objective and controls. Status: Passed. Manual retest confirmed the objective banner and controls text are clear enough for the first playable.
All three recovery targets are visually distinguishable on screen. Status: Passed. Manual retest confirmed all three recovery targets are visible and distinguishable with labels/markers.
The target that can be recovered near the player is visually distinguished. Status: Passed. Manual retest confirmed the nearby interaction state and Press E prompt are understandable.
Recovering all targets clearly transitions the job to complete. Status: Passed. Manual retest confirmed progress UI and Job Complete are understandable.

Manual play remains free of visible errors, freezes, or abnormal behavior. Status: Passed. User reported no visible errors, freezes, or abnormal behavior. Automated console verification is tracked separately.

assertions.message: Manual retest confirmed the objective and controls are understandable after the UX fixes.
Manual retest confirmed the player is visible and movement is acceptable for a first playable.
Manual retest confirmed the camera now frames the player and recovery targets.
Manual retest confirmed all three targets are visible and distinguishable.
Manual retest confirmed the nearby interaction state and Press E prompt are understandable.
Manual retest confirmed E-key recovery response is sufficient for this first playable.
Manual retest confirmed recovery progress is understandable.
Manual retest confirmed the completion state is recognizable.
Manual retest confirmed the previous invisible/magenta presentation problem is resolved for first-playable purposes.
User reported no runtime errors, freezes, or abnormal behavior.
Manual retest confirmed this is acceptable as a first playable: not a finished game, but the core loop can be understood and played.
Art, sound, recovery presentation, tutorial flow, rewards, and the next-job/company loop remain future improvements, not blockers for this first playable.

remainingGaps: This is not a finished game.
Art, sound, and recovery presentation remain placeholder-level.
Tutorial flow is still simple instructional UI rather than a full game-like onboarding sequence.
Next-job, reward, and company management loops are not implemented yet.
nextActions: Treat this build as a Human Playable First Build Candidate and continue with art, sound, tutorial, reward, and next-job loop work before any public release claim.

manualFeedback.summary: Manual retest confirmed the previous camera, visibility, and magenta presentation issues are resolved enough for a first playable. The player can understand the objective, move, recover three targets, read progress, and recognize Job Complete without visible runtime instability.

uxChangesApplied: Added HUD controls text: WASD / Arrow Keys: Move and E: Recover nearby target.
Added Recover labels and marker spheres above all three recovery targets.
Added nearest-target highlight that changes the marker and label to Press E: Recover.
Changed recovered targets to green/dimmed visual state and Recovered label.
Kept Job Complete visible in the progress UI after all three recoveries.
Switched generated materials to URP-compatible shaders to remove magenta/pink missing-shader rendering.
Reframed the main camera with an orthographic centered view so the player and recovery targets are visible.
Added a player marker/label and enlarged target markers/labels for readability.
Added a simple objective banner separate from the controls text.
